data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding multiple documents per credential.

The prior steps do not address the existence or handling of multiple documents associated with a single credential, leading to an inconclusive result. Without concrete evidence or checks confirming this requirement, the validation cannot be completed.
